ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123-4567890-1234567 Has Shipped
ham.body:
Hello [Customer Name],

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order has been shipped and is on its way. Here are the details:

Order #: 123-4567890-1234567
Items:
- Kindle Paperwhite – $129.99
- USB-C Charger – $19.99

Estimated delivery: 3-5 business days

Track your shipment: <URL>

If you have any questions, contact Amazon Customer Service.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon.com

spam.subject: URGENT: Crypto Wallet Suspension Notice
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

We have detected unusual activity on your crypto wallet associated with your account. To prevent suspension of your wallet and loss of funds, you must verify your identity within 24 hours. Failure to comply will result in immediate suspension.

Please click the link below to complete the verification process: <URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
CryptoSecure Support Team
